overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor village at dusk. The scene features traditional timber-framed architecture, atmospheric torchlight against an orange stormy sky, and transitions from waterfront to rural countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor waterfront with castle view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the harbor path with castle towers visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall stone castle towers silhouetted against the orange dusk sky
wooden harbor structures with lit windows along the waterfront
burning fire pit in metal cage providing warm orange light
calm water reflecting the dusk sky and torchlight
vertical wooden posts along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide harbor waterfront at dusk, with Geralt walking along a dirt path. Medieval wooden buildings line the left side while the harbor water stretches to the right. In the distance, castle towers rise against an orange stormy sky, and bonfires provide warm flickering light along the path.

events.description: encounter first NPC kneeling by the water's edge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path, approaching village buildings and passing NPCs

notable_agents.action: villager kneeling by the water's edge, possibly washing or gathering water
armed guard in red cloak walking along the path toward the camera

entered.detail: traditional medieval house with exposed wooden beams and thatched roof
wooden wagon with large wheels parked beside the building

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the waterfront, the path narrows as timber-framed houses appear closer on the left. The castle towers shift to the right side of the frame. A villager kneels by the water's edge, and an armed guard approaches from ahead. The atmosphere remains moody with firelight illuminating the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with timber houses

events.description: character turns left around the corner of a timber-framed building
moving from open waterfront into enclosed village interior with closely packed wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: turning left around a building corner and proceeding through the village center between closely packed houses

entered.detail: large two-story timber building with glowing windows and smoking chimney
wooden post with burning torch providing flickering light
piles of cut firewood stacked beside the path
stone well in the middle of the village path

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around a corner, transitioning from the waterfront into a narrow village street. Timber-framed houses enclose the path on both sides, with a tavern featuring a smoking chimney on the left. Torch posts and stacked firewood line the dirt path as the harbor disappears from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path exiting village with wooden fences

events.description: transitioning from built-up village to open countryside with fences and trees

agents.ego_description: walking along a rural dirt path leaving the village behind, heading toward open countryside

entered.detail: rustic wooden picket fence lining the right side of the path
tall leafy tree beside the path providing shade
small wooden cabin with thatched roof in the distance
stacked wooden barrels beside a building
rolling hills visible on the horizon beyond the village

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the transition from village to countryside. The path opens up with wooden fences appearing on the right and large trees on the left. The village buildings fall behind as the terrain becomes more rural, with log cabins and distant hills visible ahead. The atmosphere remains consistently moody with the dusk lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide harbor waterfront into the enclosed streets of a medieval village before opening up into the rural countryside. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path beside the harbor water, where castle towers rise against an orange stormy sky and bonfires cast a warm flicker over the scene. As the path narrows, the camera passes a kneeling villager and an approaching guard, with the timber-framed houses drawing closer before the character turns left around a corner. The scene then shifts into a narrow village street enclosed by houses and a smoking tavern chimney, leaving the waterfront behind as torch posts and stacked firewood line the way. Finally, the village buildings recede as the path opens up into a rural landscape featuring wooden fences, large trees, and distant hills under the moody dusk light.
